/usr/bin/ar qc libcrypto_lib.a CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/core/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/core/EventBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/core/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/exchange/WebSocketClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/exchange/BinanceExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/exchange/BybitExchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/data/DataFeed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/data/HistoricalLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/indicators/EMA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/indicators/RSI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/indicators/ATR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/indicators/PineScriptIndicator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/indicators/IndicatorEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/ml/FeatureExtractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/ml/LSTMModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/ml/XGBoostModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/ml/ModelTrainer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/ml/SignalEnhancer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/strategy/RiskManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/strategy/MLEnhancedStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_lib.dir/src/ui/Dashboard.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcrypto_lib.a
